arts.ttl: Crystal Palace chairman Steve Parish blasts Millwall keeper over red card challenge on Jean-Philippe Mateta
arts.sum: Palace striker Mateta needed instant treatment before being stretchered off and taken to hospital. The stopper was sent off after eight minutes at Selhurst Park after rushing out of his goal and clattering Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta.

arts.ttl: Millwall fans slammed over 'disgraceful' Jean-Philippe Mateta chant after kung-fu kick
arts.sum: Crystal Palace forward Jean-Philippe Mateta appeared unconscious after being hit with a boot to head by Millwall keeper Liam Roberts during their FA Cup clash on Saturday, before being targeted by the away fans

arts.ttl: Tanganga own goal gives Crystal Palace the lead against Millwall
arts.sum: Watch as former Tottenham defender Japhet Tanganga heads a Will Hughes strike into the back of his own net to give Crystal Palace the lead against Millwall in the FA Cup fifth round.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace’s Jean-Philippe Mateta hospitalised after horror challenge by Millwall goalkeeper in FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Liam Roberts was shown a straight red card for the challenge which left the Palace striker needing medical support

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace chief fumes at 'terrible challenge' and offers Jean-Philippe Mateta health update
arts.sum: Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta had to be rushed to hospital after being on the wrong end of a kung-fu kick from Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts in their FA Cup fifth-round tie

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace star Mateta hospitalised by horror challenge
arts.sum: Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta has been sent to hospital in an ambulance following a dangerous challenge by Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts. The Frenchman was competing for a bouncing ball when the shot stopper lunged in with a high boot, clearing the ball but kicking the player in the head at the same time just […] The post Crystal Palace star Mateta hospitalised by horror challenge first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: FA Cup match delayed as Jean-Philippe Mateta rushed to hospital after sickening head injury
arts.sum: The Crystal Palace striker was floored by a high boot from Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts

arts.ttl: Analysis: Wharton's return gives Palace attack extra ammunition
arts.sum: Adam Wharton made his first start for four months in Crystal Palace's 4-1 win over Aston Villa on Tuesday night. Palace’s Expected Goals (xG) of 2.0 in the first half was their fourth-highest total on record in the opening 45 minutes of a Premier League match.

arts.ttl: FA Cup match delayed as medics rush to help Jean-Philippe Mateta after horror tackle
arts.sum: Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta was down for several minutes and replaced by Eddie Nketiah after a challenge from Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts, who was sent off

arts.ttl: ‘Kickstarting his career again’ - Crystal Palace boss on loan deal for Chelsea defender with first start handed in Millwall FA Cup clash
arts.sum: That improvement was a key reason for Chilwell joining the south London club with his minutes limited at Chelsea and Glasner believes the player is close to being back to his best. “He’s integrated great from day one,” said Glasner.
